name: Aquatic
effects: Ocean Worlds: +20% Habitability, Pop housing usage −10%. Dry and Cold planets: −20% Habitability. This species is perfectly adapted to living in the depths of the ocean.

name: Hive-Minded
effects: Not affected by happiness, +20 Years leader lifespan. This species is made up of semi-autonomous individuals slaved to a single, unfathomably vast consciousness.

name: Adaptive
effects: +10% Habitability. This species is highly adaptive when it comes to foreign environments.

name: Extremely Adaptive
effects: +20% Habitability. This species is remarkably adept at adapting to any foreign environments.

name: Agrarian
effects: +15% Farming job efficiency. This species has a deep connection to the land, and make expert farmers and gardeners.

name: Charismatic
effects: +20% Amenities job efficiency. Members of this species have a special charisma, and are generally considered pleasant to be around.

name: Communal
effects: −10% Pop housing usage. Members of this species are highly communal, and quite used to living in close proximity to others.

name: Conformists
effects: +30% Governing ethics attraction. These people always seek consensus and are more likely to conform to the governing ethics.

name: Conservationist
effects: −10% Pop consumer goods upkeep. Members of this species believe that resources must be conserved and recycled.

name: Docile
effects: −10% Empire size from pops. Members of this species are easy to manage and organize.

name: Enduring
effects: +20 Years leader lifespan. Lifespans in this species are unusually long.

name: Venerable
effects: +80 Years leader lifespan. This species can grow to an age that commands dignity and respect.

name: Industrious
effects: +15% Mining job efficiency. Members of this species are known for their diligent and hard-working nature.

name: Ingenious
effects: +15% Technician job efficiency. Members of this species are good at 'thinking outside the box'.

name: Intelligent
effects: +10% Research job efficiency. This species is highly intelligent, and enjoys faster technological progress.

name: Natural Engineers
effects: +15% Engineering research job efficiency. Members of this species have a natural inclination towards engineering.

name: Natural Physicists
effects: +15% Physics research job efficiency. Members of this species have a natural inclination towards theoretical physics.

name: Natural Sociologists
effects: +15% Society research job efficiency. Members of this species have a natural inclination towards sociology.

name: Nomadic
effects: −35% Resettlement cost. This species has a nomadic past.

name: Quick Learners
effects: +10% Leader experience gain. Members of this species are quick to learn from their experiences.

name: Rapid Breeders
effects: +10% Pop growth speed. This species reproduces at a very rapid rate.

name: Resilient
effects: +50% Defense army damage. Members of this species are physiologically resilient.

name: Strong
effects: +20% Army damage, +2% Worker job efficiency. Members of this species possess great physical strength.

name: Very Strong
effects: +40% Army Damage, +5% Worker job efficiency. Members of this species possess a strength that almost defies the laws of physics.

name: Talented
effects: −10% Leader upkeep. Member of this species are born with a natural aptitude.

name: Thrifty
effects: +25% Job Efficiency for Trader Jobs. Members of this species are instinctively economical.

name: Traditional
effects: +10% Bureaucrat job efficiency. This species is predisposed to especially value historical precedence and group unity.
